message:
refactor: incremental improvements to render, text, and widgets

Follow-up refinements from concurrent development:

Buffer (buffer.rs):
- Additional dirty tracking helpers
- Minor API consistency fixes

Text lib.rs:
- Export adjustments for new width_cache functionality

Width cache (width_cache.rs, +427 lines):
- Extended caching strategies
- Statistics and metrics collection
- Cache warm-up utilities for common character sets
- Memory usage reporting

Command palette (mod.rs):
- Refactored action handling
- Improved keyboard navigation edge cases
- Better empty-state rendering
- Category collapse/expand persistence

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
